queries.natural_language: List away_goals, player_of_the_match, row_id from match_result where away_goals is >= 1.
queries.sql: SELECT "away_goals", "player_of_the_match", "row_id" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) >= 1);

queries.natural_language: List away_goals, date, oid from match_result where away_goals is <= 2.
queries.sql: SELECT "away_goals", "date", "oid" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) <= 2);

queries.natural_language: List home_goals, home_team, player_of_the_match from match_result where home_goals is between 0 and 2.
queries.sql: SELECT "home_goals", "home_team", "player_of_the_match" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("home_goals" AS REAL) >= 0 AND CAST("home_goals" AS REAL) <= 2);

queries.natural_language: List home_goals, player_of_the_match_team, date from match_result where home_goals is <= 2.
queries.sql: SELECT "home_goals", "player_of_the_match_team", "date" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("home_goals" AS REAL) <= 2);

queries.natural_language: List oid, away_goals, home_team from match_result where oid is >= 11.
queries.sql: SELECT "oid", "away_goals", "home_team" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("oid" AS REAL) >= 11);

queries.natural_language: List row_id, home_goals, player_of_the_match_team from match_result where row_id is >= 8.
queries.sql: SELECT "row_id", "home_goals", "player_of_the_match_team" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) >= 8);

queries.natural_language: List row_id, player_of_the_match, player_of_the_match_team from match_result where row_id is <= 35.
queries.sql: SELECT "row_id", "player_of_the_match", "player_of_the_match_team" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) <= 35);

queries.natural_language: List oid, home_goals, row_id from match_result where oid is <= 45.
queries.sql: SELECT "oid", "home_goals", "row_id" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("oid" AS REAL) <= 45);

queries.natural_language: Find home_goals, player_of_the_match_team, home_team from match_result where home_goals is <= 2 and home_goals is between 0 and 2.
queries.sql: SELECT "home_goals", "player_of_the_match_team", "home_team" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("home_goals" AS REAL) <= 2) AND (CAST("home_goals" AS REAL) >= 0 AND CAST("home_goals" AS REAL) <= 2);

queries.natural_language: Find row_id, home_goals, home_team from match_result where row_id is >= 8 and away_goals is <= 2.
queries.sql: SELECT "row_id", "home_goals", "home_team" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) >= 8) AND (CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) <= 2);

queries.natural_language: Find away_goals, home_goals, row_id from match_result where away_goals is between 1 and 2 and away_goals is <= 2.
queries.sql: SELECT "away_goals", "home_goals", "row_id" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) >= 1 AND CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) <= 2) AND (CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) <= 2);

queries.natural_language: Find away_goals, away_team, player_of_the_match_team from match_result where away_goals is between 1 and 2 and away_goals is >= 1.
queries.sql: SELECT "away_goals", "away_team", "player_of_the_match_team" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) >= 1 AND CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) <= 2) AND (CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) >= 1);

queries.natural_language: Find home_goals, away_team, player_of_the_match_team from match_result where home_goals is <= 2 and away_goals is >= 1.
queries.sql: SELECT "home_goals", "away_team", "player_of_the_match_team" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("home_goals" AS REAL) <= 2) AND (CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) >= 1);

queries.natural_language: Find home_goals, home_team, player_of_the_match_team from match_result where home_goals is between 0 and 2 and away_goals is >= 1.
queries.sql: SELECT "home_goals", "home_team", "player_of_the_match_team" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("home_goals" AS REAL) >= 0 AND CAST("home_goals" AS REAL) <= 2) AND (CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) >= 1);

queries.natural_language: Find away_goals, date, oid from match_result where away_goals is <= 2 and away_goals is >= 1.
queries.sql: SELECT "away_goals", "date", "oid" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) <= 2) AND (CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) >= 1);

queries.natural_language: Find oid, home_team, player_of_the_match_team from match_result where oid is >= 11 and away_goals is >= 1.
queries.sql: SELECT "oid", "home_team", "player_of_the_match_team" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("oid" AS REAL) >= 11) AND (CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) >= 1);

queries.natural_language: Find oid, date, home_team from match_result where oid is <= 45, home_goals is <= 2, and home_goals is between 0 and 2.
queries.sql: SELECT "oid", "date", "home_team" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("oid" AS REAL) <= 45) AND (CAST("home_goals" AS REAL) <= 2) AND (CAST("home_goals" AS REAL) >= 0 AND CAST("home_goals" AS REAL) <= 2);

queries.natural_language: Find away_goals, date, away_team from match_result where away_goals is between 1 and 2, row_id is >= 8, and away_goals is <= 2.
queries.sql: SELECT "away_goals", "date", "away_team" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) >= 1 AND CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) <= 2) AND (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) >= 8) AND (CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) <= 2);

queries.natural_language: Find oid, player_of_the_match_team, date from match_result where oid is <= 38, home_goals is <= 2, and home_goals is between 0 and 2.
queries.sql: SELECT "oid", "player_of_the_match_team", "date" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("oid" AS REAL) <= 38) AND (CAST("home_goals" AS REAL) <= 2) AND (CAST("home_goals" AS REAL) >= 0 AND CAST("home_goals" AS REAL) <= 2);

queries.natural_language: Find home_goals, home_team, row_id from match_result where home_goals is between 0 and 2, away_goals is <= 2, and away_goals is >= 1.
queries.sql: SELECT "home_goals", "home_team", "row_id" FROM "match_result" WHERE (CAST("home_goals" AS REAL) >= 0 AND CAST("home_goals" AS REAL) <= 2) AND (CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) <= 2) AND (CAST("away_goals" AS REAL) >= 1);
